---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or capability for MCP Project Context Server
title: "<short description of the feature>"
type: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve. Explain the limitation or gap in the current behaviour and why it matters.

---

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see implemented. Describe the expected behaviour from the user's perspective.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you have evaluated and why you believe the proposed solution is preferable.

---

## Affected Components

List the tools, modules, or integrations you expect this feature to affect (e.g. `search_context`, `index_context`, ChromaDB integration, Ollama embedder):

- 

---

## ADR Consideration

Does this feature introduce or replace a dependency, affect more than one component, or have non-obvious trade-offs?

- [ ] Yes — an ADR may be required before implementation (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#architecture-decision-records-adrs))
- [ ] No — this is a self-contained, low-risk change

If yes, briefly describe the trade-offs or architectural implications:

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or prior art that may help evaluate this request — related issues, ADRs, external documentation, etc.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this has not already been requested
- [ ] I have described the problem, not just the solution
- [ ] I have considered whether an ADR is required for this change
- [ ] This request is scoped to a single concern (not multiple unrelated features)
